headline: Turtle Beach Corporation Announces CFO Transition
summary: Andrew Clipsham Named Interim Chief Financial Officer Company Reaffirms Full Year 2026 Financial Guidance SAN DIEGO, May 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Turtle Beach Corporation (Nasdaq: TBCH, the “Company” or “Turtle Beach”), a leading gaming accessories brand, today announced that Andrew Clipsham, Turtle Beach’s Senior Director of Finance, has been appointed interim Chief Financial Officer effective June 15, 2026. headline: Does PepsiCo’s Dividend Streak and New Board Voice Reshape Its Capital Allocation Narrative (PEP)?
summary: At PepsiCo’s 2026 annual meeting on May 6, shareholders elected David W. Gibbs to the board and voted down proposals on human rights oversight, an independent board chair, and animal-welfare reporting. A separate product push is underway as Mountain Dew and Little Caesars revive the limited-time, exclusive Mango Rush flavor nationwide for summer 2026, underscoring PepsiCo’s continued use of partnerships and exclusives to attract consumers. Now we’ll examine how robust international growth...

headline: Coca-Cola vs. PepsiCo: Which Beverage Stock Looks Poised for Growth?
summary: KO and PEP are reshaping portfolios for zero-sugar and functional drinks as pricing power, distribution scale and cost pressures test margins.

headline: Seed Health Appoints Anisha Raghavan as First-Ever Chief Marketing Officer to Lead Next Chapter of Brand Growth
summary: Seed Health, a microbiome science company, today announced the appointment of Anisha Raghavan as its first chief marketing officer (CMO). With more than two decades of experience building and scaling consumer brands across global CPG, retail, and high-growth DTC companies, Raghavan will lead Seed's global marketing organization — overseeing brand, growth, creative, and commercial strategy.
